goal: Build a small automatic plant watering device from cheap or salvaged parts. It should read soil moisture and run a mini pump briefly when the plant is dry.

attachments.description: Human-reviewed bench annotations for plant watering measurements
vision_evidence_notes: measure: controller_case inner width value_mm=95 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/caliper-log
measure: pump_mount width value_mm=55 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/board-photo-set
measure: tube strain relief value_mm=8 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/board-photo-set
clearance: controller_case cable clearance clearance_mm=1.2 status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/caliper-log
clearance: pump_mount tube bend clearance clearance_mm=2.0 status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/board-photo-set
